languages.text: "Лорд-капитан?" {n}На лице Иокасты написано недоверие, словно бы она не верит в то, что видит.{/n} "Но... вы..." {n}Неожиданно спохватившись, Мастер Дисциплины вытягивается по стойке смирно.{/n}

"Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан?" {n}На лице Иокасты написано недоверие, словно бы она не верит в то, что видит.{/n} "Но... вы..." {n}Неожиданно спохватившись, Мастер Дисциплины вытягивается по стойке смирно.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

"Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

"Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

"Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

languages.text: 「艦長様？」{n}サウアーバックの顔には、信じられないという表情が浮かんでいた。{/n}「でも…あなた…」{n}突然、落ち着きを取り戻した艦長は、肩を正して、敬礼をした。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様？」{n}サウアーバックの顔には、信じられないという表情が浮かんでいた。{n}「でも…あなた…」{n}突然、落ち着きを取り戻した艦長は、肩を正して、敬礼をした。

languages.text: «¿Lord Capitán?». {n}La incredulidad del rostro de Sauerback es evidente. No parece creer lo que ve.{/n} «Pero... usted...». {n}La maestra de armas recupera rápidamente la compostura y se endereza, poniéndose firme.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Lord Capitán?». {n}La incredulidad del rostro de Sauerback es evidente. No parece creer lo que ve.{/n} «Pero... usted...». {n}La maestra de armas recupera rápidamente la compostura y se endereza, poniéndose firme.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Sauerback sieht dich ungläubig an, als würde sie ihren Augen nicht trauen.{/n} "Aber ... Ihr ..." {n}Plötzlich findet die Waffenmeister ihre Fassung wieder, wirft sich in die Brust und steht stramm.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Sauerback sieht dich ungläubig an, als würde sie ihren Augen nicht trauen.{/n} "Aber ... Ihr ..." {n}Plötzlich findet die Waffenmeister ihre Fassung wieder, wirft sich in die Brust und steht stramm.{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ? » {n}Sauerback vous dévisage, incrédule.{/n} « Mais... vous... » {n}La capitaine d'armes se ressaisit rapidement, redresse les épaules et se met au garde-à-vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ? » {n}Sauerback vous dévisage, incrédule.{/n} « Mais... vous... » {n}La capitaine d'armes se ressaisit rapidement, redresse les épaules et se met au garde-à-vous.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人？”{n}苏尔贝克脸上写满了难以置信，仿佛不敢相信眼前所见。{/n}“可是……您……”{n}这位戒律大师很快恢复了镇定，挺直肩背，立正站好。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人？”{n}苏尔贝克脸上写满了难以置信，仿佛不敢相信眼前所见。{/n}“可是……您……”{n}这位戒律大师很快恢复了镇定，挺直肩背，立正站好。{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan..." {n}Sauerback'in suratı, sanki gördüklerine inanamıyormuş gibi bir inançsızlık ifadesine ev sahipliği yapıyor.{/n} "Fakat... Siz..." {n}Aniden toparlanan Silahtar, omuzlarını geriye atarak esas duruşa geçiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain?" {n}Disbelief is written on Sauerback's face, as if she cannot believe what she's seeing.{/n} "But... you..." {n}Suddenly regaining her composure, the Master-at-Arms throws back her shoulders, standing at attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan..." {n}Sauerback'in suratı, sanki gördüklerine inanamıyormuş gibi bir inançsızlık ifadesine ev sahipliği yapıyor.{/n} "Fakat... Siz..." {n}Aniden toparlanan Silahtar, omuzlarını geriye atarak esas duruşa geçiyor.{/n}
